mapper.select: SELECT id, question_id, writer_id, parent_answer_id, depth, content, like_count, delflag, created_at, updated_at FROM answers WHERE id = #{id} AND delflag = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO answers (question_id, writer_id, parent_answer_id, depth, content, like_count, delflag, created_at) SELECT q.id, #{writerId}, NULL, 0, #{content}, 0, 'N', NOW() FROM questions q WHERE q.id = #{questionId} AND q.delflag = 'N' AND (q.visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR (q.visibility = 'TEAM' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM team_members tm WHERE tm.team_id = q.team_id AND tm.user_id = #{writerId} AND tm.delflag = 'N')))

INSERT INTO answers (question_id, writer_id, parent_answer_id, depth, content, like_count, delflag, created_at) SELECT a.question_id, #{writerId}, a.id, a.depth + 1, #{content}, 0, 'N', NOW() FROM answers a JOIN questions q ON a.question_id = q.id WHERE a.id = #{parentAnswerId} AND a.delflag = 'N' AND a.depth < 2 AND q.delflag = 'N' AND (q.visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR (q.visibility = 'TEAM' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM team_members tm WHERE tm.team_id = q.team_id AND tm.user_id = #{writerId} AND tm.delflag = 'N')))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions q WHERE q.id = #{questionId} AND q.delflag = 'N' AND (q.visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR (q.visibility = 'TEAM' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM team_members tm WHERE tm.team_id = q.team_id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.delflag = 'N')))

SELECT a.id, a.question_id, a.writer_id, u.nickname AS writer_nickname, a.parent_answer_id, a.depth, a.content, a.like_count, a.created_at, a.updated_at FROM answers a JOIN users u ON a.writer_id = u.id AND u.delflag = 'N' WHERE a.question_id = #{questionId} AND a.delflag = 'N' ORDER BY a.depth ASC, a.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE answers a JOIN questions q ON a.question_id = q.id SET a.content = #{content}, a.updated_at = NOW() WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.writer_id = #{writerId} AND a.delflag = 'N' AND (q.visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR (q.visibility = 'TEAM' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM team_members tm WHERE tm.team_id = q.team_id AND tm.user_id = #{writerId} AND tm.delflag = 'N')))

UPDATE answers a JOIN questions q ON a.question_id = q.id SET a.delflag = 'Y' WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.writer_id = #{writerId} AND a.delflag = 'N' AND (q.visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR (q.visibility = 'TEAM' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM team_members tm WHERE tm.team_id = q.team_id AND tm.user_id = #{writerId} AND tm.delflag = 'N')))

UPDATE answers a JOIN ( WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS ( SELECT id FROM answers WHERE parent_answer_id = #{id} AND delflag = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT ans.id FROM answers ans JOIN descendants d ON ans.parent_answer_id = d.id WHERE ans.delflag = 'N' ) SELECT id FROM descendants ) AS desc_ids ON a.id = desc_ids.id SET a.delflag = 'Y' WHERE a.delflag = 'N'
